name: vedaai-monorepo
description: VedaAI - A comprehensive AI-powered learning platform (Frontend + Backend)

scripts.install-all: npm install && cd vedaAiBackend && yarn install
scripts.dev: npm run dev --prefix vedaai-frontend & yarn --cwd vedaAiBackend dev
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix vedaai-frontend && yarn --cwd vedaAiBackend build
